scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs');['pnpm-lock.yaml','yarn.lock'].forEach(f=>{try{fs.unlinkSync(f)}catch{} }); const ua=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||''; if(!/^npm\//.test(ua)){console.error('Use npm instead'); process.exit(1)}"
scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:libs && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
